title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the CLI and server to pull and run large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, offering sync/async APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, runnable in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, enabling LLM and embeddings usage inside LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’) that supports chat, RAG, and multi-user workspaces.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama, providing fluent builders and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama with additional helpers for batch jobs and config management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app demonstrating how to stream Ollama responses over a simple WebSocket.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo showing retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama, ChromaDB, and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that pipelines Ollama model pulling, testing, and container image building in CI.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama, allowing declarative installs and model definitions on NixOS.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Curated collection of notebooks and scripts exploring vision models, tool use, and fine-tuning with Ollama.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, and other popular LLMs.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for Ollama with .NET 8, supporting streaming and dependency injection.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions and threads.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component exposing Ollama as a conversation agent for local voice assistants.
